prospects.ind: Gambling & Gaming; Sports Betting; Fantasy Sports
prospects.no:
LinkedIn connection accepted Nov. 2025
As a Vice President of Software Engineering at FanDuel, I lead global engineering efforts focused on building the next generation of marketing technology for one of the most dynamic and high-growth companies in online sports betting and gaming. I own and drive the strategy, development, and continuous evolution of FanDuel’s Marketing & Promotions Platform, a business-critical system that powers engagement and personalized experiences across multiple business units. Since stepping into this role, I’ve: ✅ Redesigned the engineering organization to prioritize innovation, platform resiliency, and time-to-market ✅ Modernized legacy systems with a roadmap toward a composable MarTech stack that is scalable, performant, and future-ready ✅ Unified diverse stakeholder needs across multiple brands and business units through a common inner-source development model ✅ Led a high-performing, globally distributed team across the US and Europe, fostering collaboration and consistent engineering excellence. I’m currently spearheading a multi-vendor RFP process to bring in best-of-breed technologies across Data Infrastructure, Customer Data Platform (CDP), and Customer Engagement Platform (CEP)—laying the foundation for a scalable, event-driven, AI-ready ecosystem that can power personalized marketing at scale. My leadership style is grounded in technical credibility, transparency, and outcome-oriented thinking. I thrive at the intersection of technology and business value, building platforms and teams that can flex, scale, and lead in a competitive, fast-moving industry.

LinkedIn connection accepted Jan. 2026
A leading expert in the resale and responsible disposal of GPU’s, servers, and networking equipment. At PICS, we understand the challenges businesses face when managing surplus or outdated hardware. Whether you're seeking to recover value for your existing assets or ensure responsible disposal, we specialize in crafting tailored solutions to meet your unique needs. Here’s how partnering with PICS can benefit you: 📈 Maximize Returns: Our extensive distribution network allows us to secure the best value for your surplus GPU’s, servers, and networking equipment, maximizing returns on your investments. 🌍 Efficient Disposal: Partner with us to ensure compliance with environmental regulations and promote eco-friendly hardware disposal practices. We prioritize sustainability in every aspect of our disposal process, minimizing environmental impact while maximizing resource recovery. 🔄 Streamlined Process: Let us handle the entire resale or disposal process seamlessly. From assessment to logistics, resale, and recycling, we take care of every detail, making the process hassle-free for you and allowing you to focus on your core business activities. If you are currently evaluating options for the resale or disposal of your hardware, please get in touch to discuss how we can tailor a solution that aligns with your business goals. Let's partner together to unlock the value of your surplus hardware while promoting sustainability and environmental responsibility. PICS Telecom is ISO 9001, TL9000 & R2 Recycling Certified
